title: docs: Unindented example code on the index page
body:
While copying the example code from the [homepage](https://podman-py.readthedocs.io/en/latest/index.html#example), it adds the extra space in the beginning of each line, which causes an indentation error while running the code. The example code should be properly formatted to prevent such issues.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6ca042b4-43b1-45c9-8f69-4b3cd0a81241)
